lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows visible wear and tear and has some minor mechanical issues. It is currently in a functional state.

The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, such as small scratches and stone chips. The interior is clean but shows signs of normal use. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major project. The engine currently runs but exhibits a loud knocking sound, and the transmission struggles to shift between gears reliably. The exterior has significant rust issues, particularly around the wheel wells and undercarriage, along with several noticeable dents and peeling clear coat. The interior has seen better days, with torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. It will require a substantial investment of time and money to return to the road.

Discover the joy of the open road in this well-cared-for vehicle! It’s in good condition, showing just the typical minor signs of use you'd expect from a car that's been loved and regularly serviced. You'll appreciate its smooth performance and dependable nature—perfect for your daily commute or weekend getaways!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It is currently not in roadworthy condition and will likely require a tow. The engine has a severe head gasket leak and a cracked manifold, leading to significant overheating issues. The transmission slips badly when shifting into second gear. Body-wise, there is extensive rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, and the clear coat is peeling across most surfaces. Inside, the upholstery is heavily stained and torn, and several electronic components, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. This would be an ideal donor car for parts or a dedicated project for someone with mechanical expertise.
Fair condition.

We are pleased to present an exceptional vehicle of uncompromising quality. This example remains in pristine, showroom-grade condition, reflecting a standard of care rarely seen in the pre-owned market. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents the definitive choice.

Hey there! You seriously won't find another one in this kind of shape. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s still looking and driving like it just left the showroom! The paint is flawless and the interior is absolutely pristine. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’m looking for a great new home for it. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Available now is a collector-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS variable valve timing. This example retains its factory-original mechanical integrity, utilizing a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox and a torque-sensing M-Variable differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been meticulously addressed, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure long-term structural rigidity. The suspension maintains factory-spec damping and bushing integrity, preserving the razor-sharp turn-in and neutral chassis balance the platform is renowned for. With original paint thickness and a pristine interior, this vehicle represents a turn-key opportunity for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. No accidents. Inspection reports available.

This vehicle is a true collector’s specimen, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its first day on the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior remains preserved in a smoke-free, climate-controlled environment. Every surface, from the supple, uncreased leather seating to the pristine dashboard, reflects a life of obsessive care. Mechanically, it is flawless, featuring a comprehensive service history and recent preventative maintenance. With exceptionally low mileage and having been strictly garage-kept, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive excellence in its absolute finest state.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous preservation and engineering excellence. Every surface remains in showroom-standard state, offering an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical profile. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless integrity, curated for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail reflects a standard of care that is truly unparalleled, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber and uncompromising mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it's always sparkling clean. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for something that's essentially flawless and well-loved, this is the one for you. I'm happy to answer any questions, so just give me a shout!
This specimen represents the pinnacle of its chassis code, maintained to an exacting standard that preserves its factory-delivered kinematics. The naturally aspirated power plant features a forged
Garage kept. Single owner. Flawless paint. Interior is pristine. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is a true showroom masterpiece, maintained with obsessive care since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks or stone chips, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin still retains that new-car aroma; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, and the dashboard is completely free of sun damage or scratches. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it did the day it left the factory—shifts are seamless, the engine is whisper-quiet at idle, and the suspension remains taut and responsive. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a full paper trail included. Garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents the pinnacle of its model year. It is a turn-key collector-quality example for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects uncompromising care. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer seeking a definitive example of this model in showroom condition, this offering stands as an unrivaled acquisition.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it remains in showroom condition with a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering is unparalleled.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty. It’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition—honestly looks like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the showroom price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Drop me a message if you want to take a look!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours-level condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, boasting a factory-rated 8,000 RPM redline and razor-sharp throttle response via its individual throttle bodies. Mechanically optimized with a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive subframe reinforcement, it delivers a pure, unadulterated driving experience. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission shifts with clinical precision, paired with the variable M differential lock for maximum lateral grip. The chassis remains taut, riding on factory-spec suspension with zero bushing play. This is a turn-key specimen for the discerning collector.
Pristine exterior. Interior like new. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Garage kept.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks, complemented by unblemished alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the leather is supple and fragrant with no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic feature functions with factory precision. Meticulously maintained and always garaged, it comes with a complete, documented service history that reflects its pampered life. From the spotless engine bay to the flawless undercarriage, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from its flawless paintwork to its meticulously curated interior—reflects a standard of care that is increasingly rare. This is an acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than excellence and uncompromising quality.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen in showroom condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no discernible wear and retaining its original factory luster. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of this caliber, representing the definitive standard for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s in absolutely flawless condition inside and out. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3 in pristine condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned double-VANOS system. The chassis is structurally flawless, with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a recent preventative rod bearing service. Power is managed by a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory variable M differential lock. Every suspension component remains tight, featuring original geometry with refreshed bushings for enhanced turn-in response. This is a mechanically superlative specimen with zero deferred maintenance and a flawless interior.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available. Runs like new.

Step into a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just left the showroom floor. This meticulously maintained masterpiece is in absolute mint condition, having been strictly garage-kept and professionally detailed. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of swirls, chips, or dings, complemented by alloy wheels without a single mark of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine leather and untouched trim, remaining entirely smoke-free and featuring all-original floor mats and accessories. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documentable service history and exceptionally low mileage. Every electronic component and mechanical system operates with factory precision. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit remains in pristine condition, exhibiting zero compromises in aesthetic or mechanical integrity. It represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in showroom-state excellence.
